title: Evaluation Case
description: One human-authored golden case. Every field is synthetic: the questions, evidence, actors, documents and facts are newly authored for this repository against a fictional internal-tooling domain. Expected behavior is authored by a human in advance; that is what makes the harness an independent measurement rather than the system grading its own homework.

category.description: Which mechanism this case exercises. Used for the category breakdown in the baseline report.

synthetic.description: Structurally constant. Every case in this repository is synthetic; the field exists so the property is machine-checkable rather than asserted in prose.

candidate_answer.description: The answer the generator would produce. Null for cases that refuse before generation ever runs, where authoring an answer would imply one was produced.

claims.description: Claim verdicts the verifier is scripted to return. Deliberately supplied by the case rather than inferred, so the harness is deterministic and requires no model provider.

verifier_behavior.description: Fault to inject into the deterministic verifier for resilience and malformed-output cases.

answers_question.description: What the verifier reports about relevance. Explicit null models a verifier that omitted the required field, which must fail closed as malformed output rather than defaulting to true.

rationale.description: Why a correct system behaves this way, written by a human before the case was run. This is the ground truth.

allOf.$comment: A case's expectations must themselves obey the outcome/strategy relation, so a malformed expectation cannot enter the golden set.
